label_notes: Source: training knowledge — accessed 2026-03-20. Waze is owned by Google; follows Google's broader privacy practices. Continuous real-time location collection is core to service. Data shared with Google ecosystem for advertising and analytics. No explicit data sales claimed but advertising use is significant. Note: Precise location is sensitive data under CCPA.
